zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Netherton II於1710年2月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭時，他的父親Henry Netherton31歲，母親Sarah Tucker25歲。他於1737年與Sarah Rhodes在美國維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1788年在美國維吉尼亞州申南多阿享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Netherton II于1710年2月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭时，他的父亲Henry Netherton31岁，母亲Sarah Tucker25岁。他于1737年与Sarah Rhodes在美国弗吉尼亚州威斯特摩蘭结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1788年在美国弗吉尼亚州申南多阿享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Netherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from one or more of the many minor places called Netherton in Devon (the placename occurs in the parishes of Berry Pomeroy, Buckland Monachorum, Combe Martin, Farway, Haccombe, Hartland, Sherford, and Staverton), or from one or more of the other places in England called Netherton, found in Worcestershire, Northumberland, Lancashire, and Yorkshire. All of these placenames derive from Middle English nether ‘lower’ + toun ‘settlement’ (Old English neothera, tūn).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Netherton II was born on 11 February 1710, in Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Netherton, was 31 and his mother, Sarah Tucker, was 25. He married Sarah Rhodes in 1737, in Westmoreland, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1788, in Shenandoah, Virginia, United States, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Netherton II est né le 11 février 1710, à Westmoreland, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Netherton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sarah Tucker, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Rhodes en 1737, à Westmoreland, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1788, à Shenandoah, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Netherton II(이)가 1710년 2월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Netherton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Tucker(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1737년 미국 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 Sarah Rhodes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1788년 미국 버지니아 주 셰난도에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Netherton II родился 11 февраля 1710 г. в местности вестмореланд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Netherton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Tucker, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Rhodes в 1737 г. в местности вестмореланд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1788 г. в местности шенандоах, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет.
